zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Flegg於大約1500年出生在英國諾福爾可希達哈姆時，他的父親John Flegg36歲，母親Margaret Wenne33歲。他於1550年與Margaret在英國英格蘭諾福爾可希達哈姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1550年5月20日之前在英國英格蘭諾福爾可希達哈姆，埋葬在英國諾福爾可希達哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Flegg于大约1500年出生在英国諾福爾可希達哈姆时，他的父亲John Flegg36岁，母亲Margaret Wenne33岁。他于1550年与Margaret在英国英格兰諾福爾可希達哈姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1550年5月20日之前在英国英格兰諾福爾可希達哈姆，埋葬在英国諾福爾可希達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Flegg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Flegg was born about 1500, in Shipdham, Norfolk, England, his father, John Flegg, was 36 and his mother, Margaret Wenne, was 33. He married Margaret in 1550, in Shipdham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 20 May 1550, in Shipdham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Shipdham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Flegg est né environ 1500, à Shipdham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Flegg, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Wenne, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Margaret en 1550, à Shipdham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 20 mai 1550, à Shipdham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Shipdham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Flegg um 1500 in Shipdham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Flegg 36 und seine Mutter Margaret Wenne 33. Er hat 1550 in Shipdham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Margaret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 20. Mai 1550 in Shipdham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shipdham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Flegg è nato il circa 1500 nel Shipdham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John Flegg, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Wenne, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Margaret nel 1550, nel Shipdham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 20 maggio 1550, nel Shipdham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Shipdham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Fleggが約1500年にイギリスノーフォルクシュイプドハムで生まれた時，父John Fleggは36歳，母Margaret Wenneは33歳であった。1550年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクシュイプドハムでMargaretと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1550年5月20日以前にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクシュイプドハムで死去し，イギリスノーフォルクシュイプドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Flegg(이)가 대략 1500년 영국 노르폴크 시p드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Flegg(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Wenne(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1550년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 시p드함에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1550년 5월 20일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 시p드함에서 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 시p드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Flegg nasceu aproximadamente 1500, em Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Flegg, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Wenne, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret em 1550, em Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 20 de maio de 1550, em Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Flegg родился около 1500 г. в местности шипдхам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Flegg было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Wenne, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret в 1550 г. в местности шипдхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 20 май 1550 г. в местности шипдхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности шипдхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Flegg nació aproximadamente 1500, en Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Flegg, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret Wenne, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Margaret en 1550, en Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 20 de mayo de 1550, en Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
